No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a required university subject for STEM students, providing tertiary education (Target 4.3) and developing foundational mathematical and problem-solving skills relevant for employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: 線性代數是對於學習理工學生們的一門必修課程
培養建立數學模型，解決問題之能力

Gender Equality.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course cultivates skills in mathematical modeling and scientific computing, which are foundational for technological upgrading and innovation, indirectly supporting economic productivity (Target 8.2).
evidence: 培養建立數學模型，解決問題之能力
培養數理資訊與科學計算之能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Linear Algebra has significant applications in 'natural sciences and engineering fields,' directly enhancing scientific research and technological capabilities (Target 9.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to climate change or action.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to peace, justice, or institutions.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course develops '資料蒐集與分析數據之基礎能力' (basic ability to collect and analyze data), which is a foundational skill for statistical capacity-building (Target 17.18).
evidence: 資料蒐集與分析數據之基礎能力
